theme: The Best Way to Learn a Language

sentences.english: What do you think is the best way to learn a new language?
sentences.korean: 새 언어를 배우는 가장 좋은 방법이 무엇이라 생각합니까?

sentences.english: I believe the most effective way to learn a new language is through immersion.
sentences.korean: 새 언어를 배우는 가장 효과적인 방법은 몰입이라고 생각해요.

sentences.english: When you're surrounded by the language every day you're forced to use it in real situations.
sentences.korean: 매일 그 언어에 둘러싸여 있으면 실제 상황에서 사용할 수밖에 없어요.

sentences.english: This is very different from studying grammar rules in a textbook.
sentences.korean: 이것은 교과서에서 문법 규칙을 공부하는 것과 매우 달라요.

sentences.english: For instance when I spent a summer in Australia my English improved more in three months than it had in three years of classroom study.
sentences.korean: 예를 들어 호주에서 여름을 보냈을 때 교실 수업 3년보다 3개월 만에 영어가 더 많이 향상됐어요.

sentences.english: Of course not everyone can travel abroad so watching movies and listening to podcasts in the target language is a great alternative.
sentences.korean: 물론 모두가 해외에 갈 수 있는 건 아니므로 목표 언어로 영화를 보고 팟캐스트를 듣는 것이 좋은 대안이에요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: The Best Way to Learn a Language
Do you think competition is healthy or harmful for
Attending a Large vs. Small School
